name: tubemind-secure-mcp
description: Secure MCP server for YouTube intelligence — 18 tools across search, video, analytics, benchmark, heuristics and competitor research. Powered by YouTube Data API v3 + Analytics API with OAuth2 (Brand Account support), AES-256-GCM token encryption and OWASP Top 10 controls.

tools.name: suggest_tags
tools.description: Tag recommendations from a seed keyword

tools.name: get_channel_analytics
tools.description: Views, watch time, retention via Analytics API

tools.name: analyze_title_patterns
tools.description: Common title patterns in top videos

tools.name: detect_content_gaps
tools.description: Topics competitors cover that you don't

tools.name: get_competitor_videos
tools.description: Top videos from a competitor channel

youtubeClientId.title: YouTube OAuth2 Client ID
youtubeClientId.description: Google OAuth2 Client ID with YouTube Data API v3 + Analytics API enabled

tokenEncryptionKey.title: Token Encryption Key (64-char hex)
tokenEncryptionKey.description: AES-256-GCM key for token encryption at rest
